title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple API and Docker images.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat component in chains and agents.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama-cli-copilot
summary: Lightweight CLI copilot that wraps Ollama for inline shell suggestions and explanations.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + Streamlit frontend.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams answers from any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor or explain code using Ollama models without leaving the editor.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Maven Central publication.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: Ollama-GUI-Electron
summary: Cross-platform desktop chat client built with Electron and React.

title: ollama-copilot.vim
summary: Experimental Vim plugin adapting Copilot.vim to use Ollama models instead of GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with LINQ-style fluent API and NuGet package.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that answers questions using Ollama models via socket-mode Bolt app.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas or generate text with Ollama.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: reddit/r/ollama - Weekly model discussion
summary: Community roundup sharing new GGUF conversions, benchmarks and usage tips for Ollama.
